evals.prompt: Audit GSC, GA4, Google Ads, form leads, qualified leads, and revenue data before producing a monthly review.
evals.expected_output: Evaluates completeness, definitions, reconciliation, decision fitness, and downstream limitations.

evals.prompt: GA4 conversions are 20% higher than CRM leads because one user can submit twice. Explain the discrepancy.
evals.expected_output: Treats this as a definition and deduplication issue rather than forcing totals to match.

evals.prompt: Missing days should be converted to zero so the dashboard looks complete.
evals.expected_output: Rejects zero-filling and labels missingness explicitly.
